tests.title: Microbiology II — Past Papers
tests.description: 70 real past-paper MCQs (2020–2022, Greek programme), each tagged with its exam year.

tests.title: Microbiology II — Recalled MCQs
tests.description: 38 student-recalled MCQs across virology, HIV/hepatitis, mycology/parasitology and vaccines/antivirals.

tests.title: Microbiology II — Topic Practice
tests.description: 95 self-test MCQs across all 19 note topics (5 per topic), each tagged with its topic for review alongside the notes.
